items.title: Solana seeing rising interest, but is it enough to boost SOL?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Increased interest in Solana could indicate potential for future growth, impacting SOL's market positioning and liquidity.

items.title: Solana ETFs still hold ‘impressive numbers’ even as token dives 57%
items.whyYouShouldCare: Despite a significant drop in SOL's price, strong ETF holdings suggest continued institutional interest, which may stabilize the ecosystem.

items.title: Kraken rolls out unified execution layer for xStocks tokenized equities called xChange
items.whyYouShouldCare: Kraken's new execution layer for tokenized equities could enhance Solana's application usage, potentially driving more liquidity into the ecosystem.
